subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou on this glorious and wondrous Day be graced with the sweet-scented fragrances of the Divine Vesture, and its perfumes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در این یوم عزیز بدیع بنفحات قمیص الهی فائز شوی و نفحات او در
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God
